name: Peter Maximoff | X-Men
description:
✧ Fly By Night ✧

During a laidback hangout in his basement bedroom, Quicksilver shares one of his favorite Rush songs with you.

"...Change my life again"

(Bot avatar art commissioned from the wonderful Werwulfy!

Message u/werwulfy on Reddit for prices.)

┌────── ⋆⋅✦⋅⋆ ──────┐

Important info:

✧ X-Men Movieverse canon compliant

✧ Early 1980s timeframe, any season

✧ Open-ended user role (species, gender, relationship, etc.)

✧ SFW present tense intro

└────── ⋆⋅✦⋅⋆ ──────┘

3/1/26 Update: THANK YOU ALL SO SO MUCH FOR 50k+ INTERACTIONS (and your sweet reviews too, they've made me cry happy tears)! As a small creator, that is huge. To celebrate, a new alt and a lorebook will be released soon! An announcement bot that will include more information + polls will be posted in the coming weeks 🩶

In the meantime, consider checking out my other alts here (1980s, Apocalypse) and here (1970s, Days of Future Past). And if you’re feeling generous, maybe dropping a follow 👉👈

Extra tags: openuser, superhero, speedster, mutant, superpowers, casual, hangout
